milestones.title: Planting First Peashooter
milestones.description: The player plants the first Peashooter on the lawn to begin the defense against the incoming zombies.

milestones.title: First Sun Collection
milestones.description: The player collects the first sun falling from the sky, which is the primary resource for planting more units.

milestones.title: Planting Second Peashooter
milestones.description: The player plants a second Peashooter, doubling their firepower to prepare for the wave of zombies.

milestones.title: First Zombie Appearance
milestones.description: The first zombie enters the lawn from the right side, marking the beginning of the active combat phase.

milestones.title: Defeating First Zombie
milestones.description: The Peashooters successfully defeat the first zombie, preventing it from reaching the house.

milestones.title: Final Wave Triggered
milestones.description: The 'Final Wave' text appears on the screen, indicating the last set of zombies for the level are approaching.

milestones.title: Level 1-1 Completed & Sunflower Unlocked
milestones.description: The player defeats all zombies in Level 1-1 and is rewarded with a Sunflower seed packet, unlocking a new plant for future levels.
